ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Reference_Order__c)), OR( Reference_Order__r.Customer__c <> Customer__c, TEXT(Reference_Order__r.Status__c)!='Approved', AND( TEXT(Order_type__c)='ZMX3', TEXT(Reference_Order__r.Order_type__c)!='ZMX1' ), AND( TEXT(Order_type__c)='ZMX2', TEXT(Reference_Order__r.Order_type__c)!='ZMX1' ), AND( TEXT(Order_type__c)='ZMX8', TEXT(Reference_Order__r.Order_type__c)!='ZMX1' ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The customer in the reference order is different from the customer in the actual order, or the reference order has not been approved, or the reference order type is incorrect.
